releaseNotes:
Update v1.1.9:

1. In-place Lossless PDF Operations: Operating directly on PDF document (remove password, split pages) to preserve interactive form fields, bookmarks, and links.
2. Warn Before Flattening: PDF reorder and merge operations warn users before flattening document interactive content.
3. Optional ZIP Export Decryption: Added opt-in ZIP export option to decrypt protected PDFs inside ZIP archive using stored passwords, utilizing secure main-isolate processing and temporary storage cleanup.
4. Performance & Core Bug Fixes: Resolved All-Docs Rename no-op, folder self-nesting, Open-With reloading, stuck loading indicators.
5. Security & Platform Hardening: Reinforced self-update mechanism with SHA-256 hash checks and host allowed-lists, biometrics, auto-lock timing, and log redactions.
